name: @fluida/react
description: React adapter for Fluida — a Provider, viewport-based layout primitives, and a container-measuring FluidaAdaptiveGrid, all built on @fluida/core.

scripts.prepack:
node -e "if (!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent || '')) { console.error('
❌ This package must be packed/published with pnpm (pnpm pack / pnpm publish), not plain npm.
   @fluida/react depends on @fluida/core via workspace:*, which only pnpm rewrites to a real version number when packing or publishing. A plain npm-packed tarball keeps the literal string "workspace:*" and fails to install anywhere outside this workspace with EUNSUPPORTEDPROTOCOL.
'); process.exit(1); }"
